title: Complete verified restore and evolution activation
content: Request[Prepare backup, restore, or evolution] --> Lock[Acquire supported writer lock]
Candidate --> Validate[Validate schema, SQLite integrity, foreign keys, counts]
Validate --> Finance[Validate exact facts, relationships, totals and dimension groups]
Finance --> Evidence[Validate evidence identity, links, decisions, coverage and exceptions]
Evidence --> History[Validate lifecycle histories, cardinality and idempotency outcomes]
History --> Manifest[Flush immutable checksum manifest and fingerprint]
Await --> Activate[Explicit activate with expected fingerprints]
Revalidate --> Pointer[Atomically replace owner-private CURRENT pointer]
Pointer --> Retain[Retain previous generation as recovery point]
